/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/HLS_TEST.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/HLS_TEST.dir/src/GlobalMoudle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HLS_TEST.dir/src/HttpParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HLS_TEST.dir/src/MySqlCppConn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HLS_TEST.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o HLS_TEST   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -lredis++ -lhiredis -lpthread -lcppkafka -lrdkafka -lhttp_parser /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglog.so.0.6.0 -lmysqlcppconn -ljsoncpp /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgflags.so.2.2.2
